## Objective

## Scope
- [ ] Customer auth
- [ ] Ticket verification
- [ ] Claim workflow
- [ ] Tenant isolation
- [ ] Audit logs
- [ ] API v2
- [ ] Documentation

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Customer cannot access another tenant's ticket data
- [ ] Verification code works without exposing internal IDs
- [ ] Winning ticket can create a claim
- [ ] Claim actions are audited
